[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]]
'''''Tela''''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]], it served aboard [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]] [[Xerxes (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Xerxes'']] at the [[Battle of Mylok IV|Mylok IV Conflict]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. ''Tela'' fled Frigate ''Xerxes'', carrying Rebel Officers, as [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Imperial pilot|pilots]] dealt the final death blows. ''Tela'' too met its demize at the hands of Imperial Ace [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]], just moments after the desctruction of Frigate ''Xerxes''.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
